items.title: 'Vast majority' of parents should be involved if children question their gender, schools told
items.description: School leaders welcome the "greater clarity" on how to handle the polarising issue for parents and pupils.

items.title: Statement win underlines GB curlers' golden claim
items.description: Team GB's men's curlers reinforce their credentials as Winter Olympic gold medal favourites with a statement 6-3 win over Sweden.

items.title: Choi, 17, denies Kim historic third halfpipe gold
items.description: Seventeen-year-old Choi Ga-on denies American great Chloe Kim snowboarding history as she brushes off an early fall to win Winter Olympic halfpipe gol...

items.title: IOC criticised for selling Nazi-era Olympics T-shirt
items.description: The International Olympic Committee defends the T-shirt as being part of its Heritage Collection, celebrating styles from all editions of the Games.

items.title: Trump revokes landmark ruling that greenhouse gases endanger public health
items.description: The White House calls it the largest deregulation in US history, but environmentalists say it will prove costly for Americans.
